flow-definition.description: Update release data.<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: MAJOR
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The major version to update data for, e.g. 21 (optional).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: UPDATE
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The update version to update data for, e.g. 21.0.1 (optional).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SAPMACHINE_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The SapMachine version to update data for (optional).

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: SCRATCH_DATA
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: If selected, the data is rebuild from scratch. Either all of it or parts, as specified by the other parameters
